prestazioni: Engine swap to 1KD-FTV (3.0L turbo-diesel) with forged internals: Mahle forged pistons (86.0mm, 18.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL race bearings. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor, 71mm turbine) on a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold (SFS Performance) for 350+ hp at 2.2 bar boost.

Full fuel system overhaul: Bosch CP3 high-pressure pump (1600 bar), 8x1000cc Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and a custom 30-liter fuel surge tank (Radium Engineering) with dual Walbro 450 LPH pumps. ECU reflash via KESS V2 with a custom Dimsport Race 2000 map optimized for E85 blend (60% ethanol).

Drivetrain reinforcement: R154 gearbox (from JZX100) with a custom bellhousing adapter (PPG), OS Giken twin-plate clutch (260mm), and a Cusco 2-way LSD (4.875 final drive). Upgraded driveshafts (Tommy Kaira) and reinforced rear axle with Nitro Gear & Axle 4.56:1 ring & pinion set.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works N70 Hilux kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber hood, and rear diffuser), paired with a custom front splitter (Seibon Carbon) and a 3-piece rear wing (Voltex Type-3).

Suspension overhaul: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 80mm drop) with custom top mounts (SuperPro) and poly bushings. Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x10.5 +15 ET, 18x12 +20 ET) with Toyo R888R tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear).

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, FIA-approved) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, custom aluminum dashboard (Voodoo13) with AIM MXS Strada digital dash, and a full sound deadening treatment (Dynamat Xtreme) paired with a JL Audio 12W7 subwoofer in a custom enclosure.
